symbol_briefs.brief_en: TSM closed at $441.40 with all EMAs above price and EMA200 rising at $336.41. Stage2 6/7 and RS 80.1 in confirmed uptrend support A+ setup near 52-week high of $449.03. Optimistic social sentiment cites AI demand and strong fundamentals as core long-term holding.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: TSM은 $441.40에 마감했으며 모든 이평선 위에 EMA200 $336.41 상승 중이다. Stage2 6/7 RS 80.1 확인된 상승추세로 A+ 셋업을 뒷받침한다. 낙관적 소셜 심리는 AI 수요와 견고한 펀더멘털을 장기 보유 핵심으로 지목한다.
symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_en: Pullback to EMA21 $419.55 or EMA50 $401.08 support

symbol_briefs.brief_en: NVDA closed at $212.45 with all EMAs above price and EMA200 rising at $187.66 after golden cross breakout. Stage2 7/7 but RS 58.2 and distribution structure limit setup to B grade. Optimistic social sentiment notes $25B bond offering drew $85B orders validating AI growth plans.

symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_en: Consolidation above EMA21 $211.16 for energy build

Stage2 7/7 and RS 100.0 in confirmed uptrend support A+ setup ahead of June 24 earnings with estimated EPS $19.66. Optimistic social sentiment cites strong AI-driven HBM/DRAM demand and sold-out 2026 capacity.

Fearful social sentiment highlights YTD underperformance around -20% and bearish technical signals including golden death cross.
